name: qqconnect_users
comment: Mapping table between MediaWiki users and QQ Connect UnionIDs. Each MediaWiki user can be bound to at most one QQ account, and each QQ UnionID can be bound to at most one MediaWiki user. UnionID is the cross-app unique identifier per QQ互联 developer account.

columns.name: qqc_user
columns.comment: MediaWiki user_id of the bound account.

columns.name: qqc_unionid
columns.comment: QQ Connect UnionID (cross-app unique identifier of the QQ user). At least 36 bytes; QQ recommends reserving 64 bytes.

columns.name: qqc_appid
columns.comment: QQ Connect APPID that was used when this binding was established. Stored for audit; not part of the uniqueness constraint because UnionID is already cross-app.

columns.name: qqc_nickname
columns.comment: QQ nickname at bind time, for display only.

columns.name: qqc_avatar
columns.comment: QQ avatar URL at bind time, for display only.

columns.name: qqc_bound_timestamp
columns.comment: Timestamp when the binding was created (MediaWiki BINARY(14) format).

indexes.name: qqc_unionid_unique
indexes.comment: Ensures a QQ UnionID is bound to at most one MediaWiki user.
